title: 24 Sheets Cartoon Make a Face Stickers, Make Your Own DIY Stickers for Kids, Art Crafts Suitable for Birthday Party Supplies Gifts (Princess)
features: √ Make a Face Princess Stickers - This stickers pack including 24 Sheets with 8 Princesses Pattern. Each sheet is 4.3*6.3 inches, all the stickers are 100% brand new. Cute stickers are perfect for gifts!

√ Superior Materials - All stickers are made of high quality vinyl PVC with sun protection and waterproof function. Safe and Non-toxic. Never faded out.The vinyl sticker can stick or peel off repeatedly, and won't leave any residue. Reusable stickers are easy to use.

√ Wide Application - These Princess stickers for water bottle, scrapbook, laptop, cars, journal etc. Our waterproof stickers are widely used. It can be used indoors and outdoors.Use your imagination, feel free to customize your belongings, make them unique and fashion!

√ Surprise Gift - These Make a face stickers for adults, kids, teens, girls, stickers collectors and DIY lovers at every important holiday (Thanksgiving, Halloween, Christmas, New Year, etc.)..I'm sure they will be very happy and excited when they receive this gift.Perfect as party supplies, party favors.

√ Service Guarantee - Customer satisfaction is our greatest motivation, please feel free to contact us if you have any problems about this sticker pack. We are committed to providing every customer with the best products and services, as well as good shopping experience.
